title: Doctor Listing Screen — Full Card Fields + Sorting Controls

requirements.text: Update the Doctor Listing Screen (`frontend/src/pages/DoctorListingPage.tsx`) so that each doctor card displays all of the following fields: doctor photo (avatar/placeholder if no image), full name, qualification (e.g., MBBS, MD), specialty, years of experience, star rating (numeric value + star icons), starting consultation fee, available consultation modes (Online / Clinic / Home Visit) as small badge icons, and a prominent 'Book Now' button styled in the Medical Blue theme. The card layout must be clean, readable, and consistent across all viewport sizes. Reuse the shared mock doctor dataset from `frontend/src/lib/mockDoctors.ts` as the single source of truth.

quotes: Each doctor card shows: Photo, Name, Qualification, Experience, Rating, Starting Fee, Available Modes, Book Button

acceptanceCriteria: Each doctor card on DoctorListingPage renders a photo or avatar placeholder when no image is available.
Each card shows the doctor's full name, qualification (e.g., MBBS, MD), specialty, and years of experience.
Each card shows a star rating with both a numeric value and star icons.
Each card shows the starting consultation fee.
Each card shows available consultation modes (Online / Clinic / Home Visit) as small badge icons.
Each card includes a prominent 'Book Now' button styled in the Medical Blue theme.
Card layout is consistent and readable on mobile, tablet, and desktop viewports.
Mock data is sourced exclusively from `frontend/src/lib/mockDoctors.ts`.

requirements.text: Add a sorting control above the doctor card list on the Doctor Listing Screen (`frontend/src/pages/DoctorListingPage.tsx`). The control must offer four sort options: 'Highest Rated', 'Lowest Fee', 'Most Experienced', and 'Available Today'. The active sort option must be visually highlighted using the Medical Blue theme. When a sort option is selected, the doctor card list must re-order in real time without a page reload. 'Available Today' must filter the list to only show doctors whose mock availability includes the current day of the week.

quotes: Sorting: Highest Rated, Lowest Fee, Most Experienced, Available Today

acceptanceCriteria: A sorting control is visible above the doctor card list on DoctorListingPage.
The control offers exactly four options: 'Highest Rated', 'Lowest Fee', 'Most Experienced', 'Available Today'.
The currently active sort option is visually distinct (e.g., filled/highlighted chip) using the Medical Blue theme.
Selecting 'Highest Rated' reorders cards by descending star rating without a page reload.
Selecting 'Lowest Fee' reorders cards by ascending starting consultation fee without a page reload.
Selecting 'Most Experienced' reorders cards by descending years of experience without a page reload.
Selecting 'Available Today' filters the list to only doctors whose mock availability includes today's day of the week.
Sorting state is preserved when navigating between specialty filters on the same screen.

constraints: Mock doctor data must remain in `frontend/src/lib/mockDoctors.ts` as the single source of truth — do not duplicate or redefine it inline.
Do not modify any files listed under frontend.immutablePaths.
All styling must follow the existing Medical Blue theme using the established CSS custom properties and Tailwind tokens.
nonGoals: No backend changes or real doctor data persistence.
No new routes — this request only updates the existing `/doctor-listing/:specialty` screen.
No changes to DoctorConsultationPage sorting (already implemented in a prior feature).
No payment or booking flow implementation in this request.
